member.summary: Options used for holding clean up file number in days.

member.summary: Gets or sets the clean up file number in days.

member.summary: Azure Function App triggered as per scheduled. Used for house keeping activites.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Azure Function App triggered as per scheduled. Used for house keeping activites.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.CompanyCommunicatorCleanUpFunction.DeleteFilesAndCards(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Common.Repositories.ExportData.ExportDataEntity})
member.summary: This deletes the files in Azure Blob storage and file cards sent to users.
member.param: the list of export data entity.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.CompanyCommunicatorDataFunction
member.summary: Azure Function App triggered by messages from a Service Bus queue Used for incrementing results for a sent notification.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.CompanyCommunicatorDataFunction.Run(System.String,System.Int32,System.DateTime,System.String)
member.summary: Azure Function App triggered by messages from a Service Bus queue Used for aggregating results for a sent notification.

member.summary: Azure Function App triggered by messages from a Service Bus queue Used for incrementing results for a sent notification.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.CompanyCommunicatorDataRecallFunction.Run(System.String,System.Int32,System.DateTime,System.String)
member.summary: Azure Function App triggered by messages from a Service Bus queue Used for aggregating results for a sent notification.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.DataQueueMessageOptions
member.summary: Options for data queue messages.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.DataQueueMessageOptions.FirstTenMinutesRequeueMessageDelayInSeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the value for the delay to be applied to the requeued data queue trigger message if the trigger message is to be requeued in the first ten minutes of the notification being sent - this way, the initial results can be aggregated more often and displayed to the user faster so they are confident sending has started and is progressing.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.DataQueueMessageOptions.RequeueMessageDelayInSeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the value for the delay to be applied to the requeued data queue trigger message if the trigger message is to be requeued after the first ten minutes of the notification being sent.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.Services.FileCardServices.FileCardService
member.summary: The file card service to manange the card.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Delete the card and send the permission expired message.

member.summary: The file card service to manange the card.

member.summary: Delete the card and send the permission expired message.

member.summary: An aggregation of the currently known results for a sent notification.

member.summary: Gets or sets the total currently known count of notification results.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.Services.NotificationDataServices.AggregatedRecallSentNotificationDataResults.SucceededCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the currently known count of successfully sent notifications.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.Services.NotificationDataServices.AggregatedRecallSentNotificationDataResults.FailedCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the currently known count of notifications that failed to send.

member.summary: Gets or sets the currently known count of notifications that were throttled.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.Services.NotificationDataServices.AggregatedRecallSentNotificationDataResults.RecipientNotFoundCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the currently known count of notifications with recipient not found issue.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.Services.NotificationDataServices.AggregatedRecallSentNotificationDataResults.LastSentDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the sent date of the last known notification.

member.summary: Update the aggregated results with the given sent notification data.

member.summary: An aggregation of the currently known results for a sent notification.

member.summary: Gets or sets the total currently known count of notification results.

member.summary: Gets or sets the currently known count of successfully sent notifications.

member.summary: Update the aggregated results with the given sent notification data.

member.summary: A service that fetches and aggregates the Sent Notification Data results.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.Services.NotificationDataServices.AggregateRecallSentNotificationDataService.#ctor(Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Common.Repositories.RecallSentNotificationData.IRecallSentNotificationDataRepository)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The recall sent notification data repository.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.Services.NotificationDataServices.AggregateRecallSentNotificationDataService.AggregateRecallSentNotificationDataResultsAsync(System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Fetches all of the current known results for the Sent Notification and calculates the various totals as results.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.summary: A service that fetches and aggregates the Sent Notification Data results.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.Services.NotificationDataServices.AggregateSentNotificationDataService.AggregateSentNotificationDataResultsAsync(System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Fetches all of the current known results for the Sent Notification and calculates the various totals as results.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.Services.NotificationDataServices.UpdateNotificationDataEntity
member.summary:
A subset of the full NotificationDataEntity setting fields as nullable in order to perform an update without needing to set the full object. Needed in order to not overwrite unset non-nullable values from the full NotificationDataEntity and remove unexpected data from the existing database row e.g. not setting TotalMessageCount for this entity will not result in the value being set to 0 in the database by mistake.
TODO(guptaa): Remove this file.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.Services.NotificationDataServices.UpdateNotificationDataEntity.Succeeded
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of recipients who have received the notification successfully.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.Services.NotificationDataServices.UpdateNotificationDataEntity.Failed
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of recipients who failed in receiving the notification.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.Services.NotificationDataServices.UpdateNotificationDataEntity.RecipientNotFound
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of not found recipients.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.Services.NotificationDataServices.UpdateNotificationDataEntity.Throttled
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of recipients who were throttled out.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.Services.NotificationDataServices.UpdateNotificationDataEntity.Unknown
member.summary: Gets or sets the number or recipients who have an unknown status.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.Services.NotificationDataServices.UpdateNotificationDataEntity.SentDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the Sent DateTime value.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.Services.NotificationDataServices.UpdateNotificationDataEntity.Status
member.summary: Gets or sets Notification status.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.Services.NotificationDataServices.UpdateNotificationDataEntity.TotalReadReceipt
member.summary: Gets or sets Total Read Count.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.Services.NotificationDataServices.UpdateNotificationDataEntity.IsCompleted
member.summary: Checks if the notification is completed.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.Services.NotificationDataServices.UpdateNotificationDataService
member.summary: Service to update notification data.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.Services.NotificationDataServices.UpdateNotificationDataService.#ctor(Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Common.Repositories.NotificationData.INotificationDataRepository)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
Updates the notification totals with the given information and results.
member.param: Flag to indicate if the notification should be forced to be marked as completed.
The total expected count of notifications to be sent.
The current aggregated results for the sent notifications.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.Services.NotificationDataServices.UpdateRecallNotificationDataEntity
member.summary:
A subset of the full NotificationDataEntity setting fields as nullable in order to perform an update without needing to set the full object. Needed in order to not overwrite unset non-nullable values from the full NotificationDataEntity and remove unexpected data from the existing database row e.g. not setting TotalMessageCount for this entity will not result in the value being set to 0 in the database by mistake.
TODO(guptaa): Remove this file.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.Services.NotificationDataServices.UpdateRecallNotificationDataEntity.Succeeded
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of recipients who have received the notification successfully.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.Services.NotificationDataServices.UpdateRecallNotificationDataEntity.Failed
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of recipients who failed in receiving the notification.

member.summary: Gets or sets the number of not found recipients.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.Services.NotificationDataServices.UpdateRecallNotificationDataEntity.Throttled
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of recipients who were throttled out.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.Services.NotificationDataServices.UpdateRecallNotificationDataEntity.Unknown
member.summary: Gets or sets the number or recipients who have an unknown status.

member.summary: Gets or sets the Sent DateTime value.

member.summary: Gets or sets Notification status.

member.summary: Checks if the notification is completed.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.Services.NotificationDataServices.UpdateRecallNotificationDataService
member.summary: Service to update notification data.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
Updates the notification totals with the given information and results.
member.param: Flag to indicate if the notification should be forced to be marked as completed.
The total expected count of notifications to be sent.
The current aggregated results for the sent notifications.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Teams.Apps.CompanyCommunicator.Data.Func.WorkerHostBuilderFunctionMetadataProviderExtension.ConfigureGeneratedFunctionMetadataProvider(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostBuilder)
member.summary: Adds the GeneratedFunctionMetadataProvider to the service collection. During initialization, the worker will return generated function metadata instead of relying on the Azure Functions host for function indexing.

member.summary: Auto startup class to register the custom implementation generated for the current worker.

member.summary: Configures the to use the custom implementation generated for the current worker.
member.param: The instance to use for service registration.
